mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, display_name, icon, sort_order, active FROM md_test_category WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, category_name, display_name, icon, sort_order, active FROM md_test_category ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO md_test_category (category_name, display_name, icon, sort_order, active) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{displayName}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE md_test_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, display_name = #{displayName}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
